title: Map bass response to macro motion

helpers.name: createTestCanvas
helpers.description: Creates an 800x600 canvas with 2D context for test use

helpers.name: computeTotalDisplacement
helpers.description: Sums Euclidean distance between corresponding particle positions

tests.description: bass energy > 0 produces greater particle displacement than bass energy = 0
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Bass band influences at least one large-scale motion property
tests.approach: Create two particle fields from the same seed. Run 5 frames on each: one with bassEnergy=0, one with bassEnergy=0.8. Accumulate per-frame displacement to avoid toroidal wrapping artifacts. Assert cumulative displacement with bass is greater.
tests.mockingStrategy: Direct particle field testing — no render loop mocking needed. Uses createParticleField() and getParticlePositions() directly.

tests.description: smoothed bass changes less frame-to-frame than raw bass with jittery input
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Response is smoothed to avoid jitter
tests.approach: Mock requestAnimationFrame for 8 frames. Feed alternating jittery frequency data (200, 50, 200, 50...) via mock pipeline. Collect bassEnergy from draw spy calls. Assert max consecutive frame difference is less than 0.4 (raw would produce ~0.52 difference).

assertions.rationale: Raw bassToMacro(200) ≈ 0.83, bassToMacro(50) ≈ 0.31 → diff ≈ 0.52. EMA smoothing (α=0.12) should dampen this well below 0.4

tests.mockingStrategy: Mock requestAnimationFrame with frame counter. Mock AnalyserPipeline with poll() that fills frequency array from jitteryValues cycle. Spy on geometry system draw() to capture bassEnergy params.

tests.description: when pipeline reports all-zero frequency data (muted), bassEnergy is still > 0
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Effect remains visible when audio is unmuted or muted
tests.approach: Mock pipeline with all-zero frequency data (simulating muted audio). Run 5 frames at 1000ms intervals via mocked requestAnimationFrame. Collect bassEnergy from draw spy. Assert at least one frame has bassEnergy > 0 due to synthetic fallback (30 + 25 * sin(elapsed * 0.001)).

assertions.rationale: Synthetic fallback generates rawBass = 30 + 25 * sin(elapsed * 0.001) when rawBass < 5, ensuring non-zero bassEnergy

tests.mockingStrategy: Mock pipeline with frequency Uint8Array filled with 0. Mock requestAnimationFrame with 1-second intervals to let synthetic sine oscillate meaningfully.

tests.description: with maximum bass (255), all particle positions remain within 0-1 bounds after many frames
tests.acceptanceCriteria: No clipping or visual instability occurs
tests.approach: Create particle field with bassEnergy=1.0 and density=0.8. Run 200 frames with delta=50 (stress-test high velocity). Assert every particle position is within [0, 1] bounds.
tests.mockingStrategy: Direct particle field testing. High delta (50) and many frames (200) stress-test the toroidal wrapping + clamping logic at maximum bass boost (3×).

tests.description: bass-driven motion respects prefers-reduced-motion (motionAmplitude=0.2 reduces displacement)
tests.acceptanceCriteria: Bass band influences at least one large-scale motion property
tests.approach: Create two particle fields from same seed with bassEnergy=0.8. One has motionAmplitude=1.0, the other motionAmplitude=0.2. Run 10 frames each. Compare total displacement from initial positions. Assert full-motion displacement exceeds reduced-motion displacement.
tests.mockingStrategy: Direct particle field comparison. Same seed ensures identical initial particle positions.

tests.description: no forbidden storage APIs accessed during bass-driven rendering
tests.acceptanceCriteria: No clipping or visual instability occurs
tests.approach: Spy on localStorage.getItem, localStorage.setItem, document.cookie getter and setter. Run 20 frames of particle field rendering with bassEnergy=0.9. Also call mapSignalsToVisuals with bass=200. Assert none of the storage spies were called.
tests.mockingStrategy: vi.spyOn on Storage.prototype and document.cookie. Tests both particle field rendering and mapping function in one pass.

relatedExistingTests: tests/visual/mappings.test.ts — T-008-14 through T-008-16: bass/treble scaling in mapSignalsToVisuals
tests/visual/renderLoop.test.ts — T-009-24, T-009-25: audio integration in render loop
tests/audio/analyser.test.ts — pipeline creation and muted-state analysis
